# When AI Writes the Solutions, Who Writes the Questions?

**Mar 22, 2026 · 24 min read**  


_A position paper on systems education co-authored with 14 GenAI TA systems across three universities._

---

[Read the full article →](./posts/adrs-systems-research-talk/)

---

## About this blog

Thoughts on database systems, storage engines, and computer science education. Built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org/) and hosted on GitHub Pages.
